title: Workplace disagreement with manager
story: My manager publicly dismissed my proposal in a team meeting without giving me a chance to explain my reasoning. I had spent two weeks preparing that analysis, and he barely glanced at it before saying 'we've tried things like this before and they don't work.' The team went quiet, and I felt humiliated. Since then, I've stopped sharing ideas in meetings and feel like my contributions don't matter. I'm considering looking for a new job, but I've been at this company for five years and built strong relationships with my colleagues.
